intro: Tiny cars. Giant tracks. Big arcade racing fun!
description:
Race tiny vehicles across oversized household tracks in Micro Overdrive: Home Tour, a fast and colorful arcade racing game inspired by classic top-down racers.

Compete through the Home Tour solo mode, unlock new cups and drivers, and master unpredictable tracks filled with playful hazards, sharp turns, and surprising twists.

Play solo or challenge friends in local Cup Mode for up to 4 players. Choose your driver, pick your difficulty, and enjoy quick, chaotic races built for couch competition.

Features:
- Home Tour solo progression
- Local multiplayer for up to 4 players
- Unlockable drivers and cups
- 6 themed championships
- 10 unique drivers
- Responsive controls
- Classic top-down arcade racing
